div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Turkey (Grew)
div.p: 13. Reference your 14, February 8, 3 p.m. The Department is gratified at the results of your conversation with the Minister for Foreign Affairs.

The substance of your first paragraph is being given to the American Board of Commissioners for Foreign Missions, Boston, and to the Near East College Association, New York, and will be used, as circumstances permit, with the press.
You will please keep the Department fully informed by cable of the progress of the proceedings which begin February 13, according to a report by the Associated Press published in today’s papers.
